creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #51)

I forgot to mention that their policy to accept patches [1] is very copyright conscious. It means that it's actually impossible for anyone except the original author of the patch to contribute it (apart from lying about who is the author, but avoiding that is the whole point of copyright law).


[1] https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Contributor_information
